Chapter: Payroll Process.
Current document status: Draft.

Section: Payroll Process.

Section: Purpose.

Document payroll responsibilities, approval flow, timing, records, and review steps.

Section: Steps.

Confirm approved compensation and changes.
Verify time or salary inputs.
Submit payroll through approved provider or system.
Record payroll entries.
File payroll reports and confirmations.
Review payroll totals during monthly close.

End of chapter: Payroll Process.
